title: tinus nigropunctata
side_effects: Tinus nigropunctata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to the presence of toxic compounds. In excessive doses, it may lead to cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and increased blood pressure. Prolonged use or misuse of the plant can also result in allergic reactions, such as skin rashes and itching. Additionally, improper use may cause interactions with other medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions.
